strengths: Exceeds 15-year minimum with 20 years of experience and MIT CS degree; demonstrates sustained technical growth across multiple domains
Current role (14 months at re:cinq) includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, showing active engagement with modern AI tooling
Staff-level roles across multiple companies indicate architectural thinking and technical leadership capability
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML despite role preferring it; AI expertise appears opportunistic rather than foundational or specialized
Zero demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms delivered; GISCollective (10-year tenure) is a geo-data platform, not AI-native
No evidence of customer advisory, enterprise strategic partnerships, or thought leadership in AI/cloud adoption—roles are primarily individual contributor execution
response.justification: Candidate exceeds minimum experience requirements (20 years vs. 15) and demonstrates solid technical fundamentals. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products'—the resume shows only 14 months of AI-related work in current role with no shipped AI products, no advanced degree in AI, and no strategic customer advisory experience. This is a capable polyglot engineer pivoting into AI, not a specialized AI strategist capable of directing platform evolution and advising on cutting-edge AI adoption.
